name: edumindai
description: EduMindAi monorepo — backend, web ve mobil geliştirme ortamı

scripts.start-all: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail -n backend,web,mobile -c blue,green,magenta "npm run start:backend" "npm run start:web" "npm run start:mobile"
scripts.setup: npm install && cd backend && composer install && cd ../web && npm install
